caution_statement: Tenants must contact property management before calling any vendor. Direct vendor calls are permitted only if management is unreachable. Be aware that if the issue is later determined not to be a genuine emergency, the tenant may be held financially responsible for any vendor charges.

contacts.name: Emergency Plumbing (All American Plumbing)
contacts.description: **If you schedule a service, you will be responsible for the costs** Emergency drain cleaning starts at $375/hour

contacts.name: Emergency Plumbing (Seay Plumbing)
contacts.description: **If you schedule a service, you will be responsible for the costs** Emergency Pricing: $275/hour minimum including travel to and from the property (2 hour minimum)

contacts.name: Emergency Plumbing (Smith Plumbing Sol.)
contacts.description: **If you schedule a service, you will be responsible for the costs** Emergency Pricing: $380/First hour + $285/each additional hour

contacts.name: HVAC (Hale's Heating and Cooling)
contacts.description: After Hours (past 6 pm) and weekend calls start at $175/hour.

contacts.name: CityBlock Maintenance
contacts.description: Contact for Emergency and non-emergency maintenance coordination.

contacts.name: CityBlock Properties Management
contacts.description: For maintenance requests and property inquiries, call and text the number above. You must also create a work order through your online portal.
